description: PERMANENT model policy for all AInchors agents. Warden enforces this. Changes require Ken approval + CHG entry + baseline update.
approvalContext: CHG-0978: Fix 8 pre-existing model-drift violations by reconciling crest_v13.phase_rules with operational per-agent models in openclaw.json and per-agent requiredPrimary. Updated phase_rules entries: design_backend/Synthesize -> ollama/deepseek-v4-pro:cloud (Atlas/Thrawn), build/Execute -> ollama/minimax-m3:cloud (Forge), creative/Synthesize -> ollama/kimi-k2.6:cloud (Spark). Removed stale t3Business.exceptions.social (was forced to flash, conflicted with requiredPrimary). Cleared 4 agent-model-tier violations + 4 CREST_V13_DRIFT violations. No openclaw.json changes; runtime agent models unchanged.

directCallLocalModels.description: Models approved for direct Ollama /api/generate and /api/chat calls (bypassing OpenClaw gateway plugin). CHG-0963 — adopt gemma4:26b as OC2A local default for direct-call sites only. CHG-0977 — register gemma4:26b-mlx as a parallel option (better small/medium-prompt latency, same CREST accuracy); CREST Verify default remains gemma4:26b (GGUF) because MLX wall-clock is ~2x slower on that workload. Gateway-mediated use via OpenClaw plugin remains BLOCKED until upstream fixes the gemma4 family thinking=true default.

approvedModels.useScope: Direct Ollama calls from workspace scripts (CREST Verify judges, context-summarize.sh, governance/QA direct-call scripts) only. NOT gateway-mediated agent sessions.

mandatoryRequestOptions.rationale: TKT-1017/CHG-0956: gemma4 family (Ollama 0.32.1) defaults thinking=true; chain-of-thought tokens consume num_predict budget and produce empty response with done_reason=length. Top-level think:false disables thinking entirely.

approvedModels.useScope: Direct Ollama calls from workspace scripts. Good for low-latency/concurrent small-to-medium tasks. CREST Verify default remains gemma4:26b (GGUF) because MLX wall-clock is ~2x slower on that workload despite identical accuracy.

mandatoryRequestOptions.rationale: TKT-1017/CHG-0956: gemma4 family (Ollama 0.32.1) defaults thinking=true; chain-of-thought tokens consume num_predict budget and produce empty response with done_reason=length. Top-level think:false disables thinking entirely. Applies to MLX variant identically.

blockedInGateway.rationale: OpenClaw plugin does not inject top-level think:false for gemma4 family models, so gateway-mediated invocations still produce empty responses. Direct scripts can control the request body. Will be re-evaluated when upstream plugin fix lands.

preservedModels.rationale: gemma4:31b and gemma4:latest remain available for ad-hoc / fallback use. Neither removed nor deprecated by CHG-0963.

operationalConstraints.rationale: Keep at default 1 — TKT-1023 verified gemma4:26b is stable at single-parallel. Higher parallelism not yet validated for 17 GB MoE on 48 GB host.

userFacing.description: Agents that interact directly with humans (Ken, Angie) via webchat or Telegram.
userFacing.rationale: CHG-0621 + CHG-0660: Yoda/Aria strong tier on kimi-k2.7-code. Yoda has no Execute phase (CHG-0545); Aria Synthesize may use cheap at per-atom discretion.

t2Governance.description: T2 governance/verdict agents: Shield, Lex, Warden, Sage.
t2Governance.rationale: CHG-0660: Split governance agents into own tier. Strong = gemma4:31b-cloud; cheap available for rare Execute/Synthesize work.

t2Backend.description: T2 design-only/backend specialists: Atlas, Thrawn, Lando, Mon Mothma.
t2Backend.rationale: CHG-0660: T2 backend tier split from governance. CHG-0804: Per-agent override for biz-process and change-mgt (requiredPrimary ollama/deepseek-v4-pro:cloud) while keeping the tier primary (ollama/deepseek-v4-flash:cloud) unchanged so Atlas/Thrawn are not affected.

t3Technical.rationale: Pre-CHG-0802 baseline: t3Technical.primary is ollama/minimax-m3:cloud. CHG-0804 restores this. openclaw.json has infra.model.primary = ollama/deepseek-v4-flash:cloud (intentional operational setting); CREST v1.3 phase_rules still control phase-level model selection.

t3Business.description: T3 business specialists: Spark, Ahsoka, Luthen.
t3Business.rationale: CHG-0804: T3 business tier primary restored to pre-CHG-0802 baseline ollama/kimi-k2.6:cloud. Ahsoka/Luthen use ollama/deepseek-v4-pro:cloud via per-agent requiredPrimary override. Spark uses ollama/kimi-k2.6:cloud per openclaw.json and requiredPrimary; CHG-0978 removed stale 'social' exception (was forced to flash) so Spark now matches the tier primary. CREST v1.3 phase_rules control phase-level model selection independently.

trialMiniMaxM3.description: CHG-0498: TERMINATED. Kept as empty archival tier.
trialMiniMaxM3.rationale: CHG-0596: Trial terminated. minimax now lives in t3Technical only.

higherQuality.description: Anthropic higher-quality tier. Parked per CHG-0502.
higherQuality.rationale: CHG-0500/CHG-0502: Tier exists structurally but Anthropic is permanently parked until 'CLAUDE ACTIVATE'.

main.modelChangeNote: CHG-0660: Tier reassignment per TKT-0540 confirmed policy.

business.modelChangeNote: CHG-0691: Aria default chat model aligned to Yoda (kimi-k2.7-code:cloud); CHG-0660 tier reassignment retained.

security.modelChangeNote: CHG-0660: Tier reassignment per TKT-0540 confirmed policy.

legal.modelChangeNote: CHG-0660: Tier reassignment per TKT-0540 confirmed policy.

qa.modelChangeNote: CHG-0660: Tier reassignment per TKT-0540 confirmed policy.

governance.modelChangeNote: CHG-0660: Tier reassignment per TKT-0540 confirmed policy.

infra._crestNote: CHG-0804: infra requiredPrimary restored to pre-CHG-0802 baseline ollama/minimax-m3:cloud. openclaw.json operational primary remains ollama/deepseek-v4-flash:cloud. CREST v1.3 phase_rules control phase-level model assignment.
infra.modelChangeNote: CHG-0804: infra requiredPrimary restored to pre-CHG-0802 ollama/minimax-m3:cloud per Ken's final target 2026-07-02.

social.modelChangeNote: CHG-0804: social requiredPrimary restored to pre-CHG-0802 baseline ollama/kimi-k2.6:cloud per Ken's final target 2026-07-02.

architect.modelChangeNote: CHG-0660: Tier reassignment per TKT-0540 confirmed policy.

platform-arch.modelChangeNote: CHG-0660: Tier reassignment per TKT-0540 confirmed policy.

biz-process.modelChangeNote: CHG-0804: Lando (biz-process) primary model set to ollama/deepseek-v4-pro:cloud per Ken's final target 2026-07-02 23:25 AEST.

change-mgt.description: Mon Mothma 🌟 — Digital Transformation CM Specialist
change-mgt.modelChangeNote: CHG-0804: Mon Mothma (change-mgt) primary model set to ollama/deepseek-v4-pro:cloud per Ken's final target 2026-07-02 23:25 AEST.

ahsoka.modelChangeNote: CHG-0804: Ahsoka primary model set to ollama/deepseek-v4-pro:cloud per Ken's final target 2026-07-02 23:25 AEST.

luthen.modelChangeNote: CHG-0804: Luthen primary model set to ollama/deepseek-v4-pro:cloud per Ken's final target 2026-07-02 23:25 AEST.

cronModelPolicy.description: All isolated agentTurn crons use gemma4:31b-cloud with kimi fallback. Exception: Morning Stand-Up uses kimi primary (Ken-approved).

kimiPolicy.allowedUse: standup + email cron + routine single-thread background non-interactive tasks only
kimiPolicy.prohibitedUse: complex orchestration, multi-ticket routing, state tracking, CHG decisions

changeControl.process: 1. Ken approval in webchat/Telegram. 2. Update this file. 3. Update critical-config-baseline.json. 4. Log CHG entry. 5. Update MEMORY.md.

modelDriftReconciliation.description: Top-level governance notes tracking model-drift reconciliation work between crest_v13.phase_rules (SSOT for phase-level model selection), per-agent requiredPrimary, and openclaw.json operational per-agent models. Maintained by Yoda on each drift-fix CHG.

crestPhaseModelMap.description: CREST v1.2 legacy overview. CREST v1.3 uses PG state_model_policy.crest_phase_rules as SSOT. Per CHG-0690, yoda_master and business Plan/Replan now use ollama/kimi-k2.7-code:cloud as primary.

pro.label: Plan / Verify / Replan
pro.fallbackRule: Retry pro → kimi. Never degrade pro → flash.

flash.label: Execute / Synthesize
flash.fallbackRule: Flash → pro escalation. Cheap → expensive, not cheap → cheaper.

_note: CREST phase model assignments added per TKT-0383. Forge flash-for-Plan is intentional — do not flag as violation.
_note_previous: This is a clean v2.0 rebuild. All interim flags, Anthropic model references, and stale policy fields removed. Anthropic models (sonnet, haiku, opus) are NOT currently approved or expected on any agent.
note: Resynced agentTiers to match actual openclaw.json agent configs. Per-agent exceptions documented. Allowed fallback chain = [deepseek-v4-pro, kimi-k2.6] or [gemma4:31b-cloud, deepseek-v4-pro, kimi-k2.6] depending on agent primary.

crestV13Transition.rationale: CHG-0500: CREST v1.3 + TKT-0368 provide structural guards for risky state manipulation. Anthropic models are no longer a special trigger — they are one option in the model-task matrix alongside Ollama Cloud models. Ken issues CLAUDE RECONFIGURE keyword; Conservative Mode flag lifted.
crestV13Transition.riskFramework: CREST v1.3 (target) + TKT-0368 — Plan→Verify→Replan gates, RVEV cycle, 2-Pass Contract, dispatch-validate.sh, model-task matrix

rollout.phase2_pending: TKT-0368: CREST v1.3 implementation (3-area: execution, token economics, memory)
rollout.phase3_pending: CREST v1.3 doc lock (Atlas + Thrawn review)

lessons.rule: Do not confabulate explanations for behavior changes. If you don't know why something changed, say so. State 'I don't know' instead of constructing a plausible narrative. Especially for model/agent/cost claims — always check the SSOT (model-policy.json, runtime metadata) before stating.
lessons.precedent: L-084 (2026-06-12): same class, model (self) fabricated 31 CHG records in a compacted summary, claimed 'sweep complete'. Permanent rule: never claim completion from a summary. Always re-run gate after context boundary.

crestPhaseOverrides.description: CREST phase-aware model overrides. strong=agent's tier primary; cheap=agent's tier cheapModel; none=phase not allowed.

phase_rules.rationale: CHG-0978: align crest_v13.phase_rules with operational per-agent requiredPrimary. Forge (agent:infra) runs on ollama/minimax-m3:cloud per openclaw.json and requiredPrimary. CREST v1.3 phase_rules now match runtime primary instead of legacy flash default.

CHG-0978: align crest_v13.phase_rules with operational per-agent requiredPrimary. Spark (agent:social) runs on ollama/kimi-k2.6:cloud per openclaw.json and requiredPrimary. CREST v1.3 phase_rules now match runtime primary instead of legacy flash default.

CHG-0978: align crest_v13.phase_rules with operational per-agent requiredPrimary. Architect (agent:architect) and platform-arch (agent:platform-arch) run on ollama/deepseek-v4-pro:cloud per openclaw.json and requiredPrimary. CREST v1.3 phase_rules now match runtime primary instead of legacy flash default.

_note_crest_v13: CREST v1.3 capability-based routing. PG state_model_policy is SSOT. This section is auto-generated nightly.
_note_agentTiers_v13: agentTiers aligned to CREST v1.3: primary = Execute/Synthesize phase model (deepseek-v4-flash for most roles). PG state_model_policy.crest_phase_rules is SSOT.

defaultPolicy.description: Default model expectation for agents without explicit tier assignment. Matches the path in openclaw.json agents.defaults.model.
defaultPolicy.rationale: CHG-0812: Reconcile to live openclaw.json default primary. Warden compares against this for default.* checks.
